PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONSIDERATION OF SUPPLEMENTAL EVIDENCE IN OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER OF DEFENDANT EL RANCHO DEVELOPMENT COMPANY S2 TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75049859) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAWELL, RYAN

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. BOTH PARTIES' REQUESTS FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE ARE GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION FILED ON NOVEMBER 12, 2024 IS STRICKEN, AS NOT APPROPRIATE ON A DEMURRER AND PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CONSIDER "EVIDENCE" SUBMITTED AFTER THE REPLY (NOVEMBER 20, 2024) IS DENIED. THE ISSUE BEFORE THE COURT IS NOT WHETHER THE BUILDING WAS SUBJECT TO THE RETROFIT REQUIREMENTS AT ANY TIME. THE ISSUE IS WHETHER AT THE TIME THE ALLEGED MISREPRESENTATION WAS MADE THE ORIGINAL LANDLORD KNEW OR SHOULD HAVE KNOWN ABOUT THE APPLICABILITY OF THE SAN FRANCISCO MANDATORY SOFT STORY RETROFIT ORDINANCE AND FAILED TO DISCLOSE OR MISPRESENTED THIS FACT. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE 10 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO ALLEGE FACTS, NOT CONCLUSIONS, TO SUPPORT THE RELEVANT ALLEGATIONS OUTLINED ABOVE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT 1301 LA PLAYA LLC ALSO KNOWN AS KDP 1301 LA PLAYA LLC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2025 Continued To Apr-16-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Both parties' Requests for Judicial Notice are granted. Plaintiff's declaration filed on November 12, 2024 is stricken, as not appropriate on a demurrer and Plaintiff's request to consider "evidence" submitted after the reply (November 20, 2024) is denied. The issue before the Court is NOT whether the building was subject to the retrofit requirements at any time. The issue is whether at the time the alleged misrepresentation was made the original landlord knew or should have known about the applicability of the San Francisco Mandatory Soft Story Retrofit Ordinance and failed to disclose or mispresented this fact. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to allege facts, not conclusions, to support the relevant allegations outlined above.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2024 Continued To Mar-05-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Continued To Jan-08-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT EL RANCHO DEVELOPMENT COMPANY S2 DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is continued to January 8, 2024. Plaintiff without any leave of Court filed additional briefing in opposition to the demurrer after the deadline for the reply, providing no time for the Court review or for the moving party to respond. The Court does not make any determination at this time whether the supplemental filing will be considered as there is no sufficient time for the review or consideration of the propriety of the filing.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
